name: memory_save
description: Save something worth remembering to long-term memory. Use for: personal info (name, job, preferences), project context (what they're working on, deadlines, decisions), topics discussed (key takeaways, conclusions), anything that would be useful in future conversations. Do NOT save: your own responses, generic knowledge, or trivial chit-chat.

text.description: The fact to remember (one concise sentence, e.g. 'User is working on a LumiTrade project for algorithmic trading')

category.description: fact=personal/project info, preference=likes/dislikes/style, entity=person/pet/org, event=date/milestone/deadline, relationship=people connections
